---
title: Linear Regression Confidence & Prediction Intervals
---

### Example: Midterm Grades

In the file [MidtermsRegression.html](MidtermsRegression.html), we looked at the relationship between midterm 1 and midterm 2 grades for students in introductory statistics. 

```{r}
exams <- read.csv('http://people.hsc.edu/faculty-staff/blins/StatsExamples/midtermRegressionS13_F15.csv')
myLM <- lm(Midterm2 ~ Midterm1, data = exams)
```

### Prediction intervals for y-values

```{r}
predict(myLM, data.frame(Midterm1 = c(50,75,100)), interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)
```


### Confidence intervals for y-values

```{r}
predict(myLM, data.frame(Midterm1 = c(50,75,100)), interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)
```

### Confidence intervals for other parameters

```{r}
confint(myLM, level = 0.95)
```
